## Issue Summary
**SonarCloud Rule:** [Name of rule triggered]  
**Severity:** [BLOCKER / CRITICAL / MAJOR / MINOR]  
**Rule ID:** [SonarCloud rule ID]  
**File(s) Affected:** [List of files]  
**Line(s):** [Specific line numbers]

## Issue Description
[Copy-paste from SonarCloud: what the issue is and why it matters]

## Current Behavior
[Show the problematic code snippet]

```python
# or appropriate language
# problematic code here
```

## Expected Behavior
[Show what the corrected code should look like]

```python
# or appropriate language
# corrected code here
```

## Impact Assessment
- **Quality Impact:** [Security / Reliability / Maintainability / Performance]
- **Risk Level:** [High / Medium / Low]
- **Technical Debt:** [Estimated effort to fix: hours]
- **Blocking:** [Yes / No]

## Remediation Steps
- [ ] Code review
- [ ] Fix implementation
- [ ] Unit tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Integration test (if applicable)
- [ ] SonarCloud re-scan verification
- [ ] PR merge
